name: appium-flaui-native-driver
description: Appium 3 Windows driver backed by a compiled C# FlaUI sidecar (UIA3/UIA2 + MSAA legacy).

_notes.appiumDeps: Add @appium/base-driver + @appium/types pinned to the Appium-3 line when building lib/driver.ts (Task 1.6). Versions to be reconciled against the running Appium 3 (see docs/DECISIONS.md ADR-011). Kept out of the initial install so the backend foundation verifies fast and clean on any OS.
